events.summary: Susquehanna raised price target on Micron Technology (MU) to $525 from $345 citing stronger memory pricing trends.

sources.title: Analyst raises price targets on memory stocks as pricing trends strengthen

events.summary: Wolfe Research upgraded Corcept Therapeutics from Underperform to Peer Perform with 42% upside potential.
Keybanc upgraded Federal Signal (FSS), a mid-cap stock, from Sector Weight to Overweight and set price target at $130.
